message:
feat(core): expand TLS lifecycle, string ops, allocator, and sort implementations

Enhance core frankenlibc-core implementations to support the newly native
ABI symbols:

- pthread/tls: expanded TLS initialization, lifecycle management, and
  runtime-math routing for thread-local validation cache and consistency
- string/str: refined string function semantics and edge case handling
- stdlib/sort: sort algorithm tuning for compliance
- malloc/allocator: allocator policy refinements

These changes provide the backing implementations for the ABI entrypoints
expanded in the previous commit, completing the glibc-to-native migration
for process, thread, string, and memory allocation hot paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
